rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LENA MAE RENFRO
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 06/07/2023. 1) No courtesy copy of the amended petition has been received. 2) No proposed order has been received. 3) No DE-120 form with a proof of service of the amended petition has been filed. A remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(D)(6) must be attached to and served with the DE-120 form. 4) A specific period for which administration of this estate is sought to be continued must be alleged (number of months or a specific date on or before which a petition for final distribution is ready to be filed). 5) An allegation must be made as to whether probate administration is pending or anticipated for the estate of each postdeceased beneficiary (Esma, James, and Belinda).

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FRANCINE MARIE DOUGLASS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. 1) Notice to the Public Administrator was not given on the mandatory Judicial Council form DE-121. 2) The petitioner in his representative capacity as trustee is a creditor of the decedent, but this petition was filed by the petitioner in his individual capacity. 3) The petitioner's trustee-creditor claim was filed more than one year after the decedent died and appears to be time-barred under Probate Code section 9352 and CCP section 366.2. See also Probate Code section 9253. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ANNA WONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. Status of closing the estate is set for 6/3/2024. A petition for final distribution or a report of status with a petition requesting additional time for estate administration must be filed at least two weeks before 6/3/24. Appearance will be required on 6/3/24 if no petition has been filed. (A petitioner should supplement (or amend) his petition, not his attorney. [CRC 7.103(c). Also, it is helpful if item 8 or an attached heir chart affirmatively indicates that a predeceased heir was not survived by issue so that there is no doubt. This Court no longer requires the local form Declaration of Real Property.)
